mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock FROM products p WHERE p.product_id = #{id}
SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock FROM products p
SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock FROM products p LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( name, description, price, stock ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock} )
